# mlir-opt crashes in  mlir::spirv::FuncOp::verifyBody()

**Author:** Emilyaxe
**URL:** https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/173563
**Status:** Closed
**Labels:** mlir:spirv, crash, generated by fuzzer
**Closed Date:** 2025-12-31T21:43:28Z

## Body

When running opt on the following IR, mlir-opt crashes. 


version 2c02e4c7909a

test.mlir

```
module {
  spirv.func @identity_2d_shape_attr_with_bounds(%arg0: !spirv.array<2 x i32>, %arg1: !spirv.array<2 x i32>) -> !spirv.array<2 x i32> "None" {
    %0 = builtin.unrealized_conversion_cast %arg1 : !spirv.array<2 x i32> to tensor<2xf32>
    %1 = builtin.unrealized_conversion_cast %arg0 : !spirv.array<2 x i32> to tensor<2xf32>
    %2 = builtin.unrealized_conversion_cast %1 : tensor<2xf32> to !spirv.array<2 x i32>
    spirv.ReturnValue %2 : !spirv.array<2 x i32>
  }
}
```


commads:

mlir-opt -remove-dead-values test.mlir

stacktrace

```
PLEASE submit a bug report to https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/ and include the crash backtrace and instructions to reproduce the bug.

<details>
When running opt on the following IR, mlir-opt crashes. 


version 2c02e4c7909a

test.mlir

```
module {
  spirv.func @<!-- -->identity_2d_shape_attr_with_bounds(%arg0: !spirv.array&lt;2 x i32&gt;, %arg1: !spirv.array&lt;2 x i32&gt;) -&gt; !spirv.array&lt;2 x i32&gt; "None" {
    %0 = builtin.unrealized_conversion_cast %arg1 : !spirv.array&lt;2 x i32&gt; to tensor&lt;2xf32&gt;
    %1 = builtin.unrealized_conversion_cast %arg0 : !spirv.array&lt;2 x i32&gt; to tensor&lt;2xf32&gt;
    %2 = builtin.unrealized_conversion_cast %1 : tensor&lt;2xf32&gt; to !spirv.array&lt;2 x i32&gt;
    spirv.ReturnValue %2 : !spirv.array&lt;2 x i32&gt;
  }
}
